name: Computer Science & Engineering
description: The Department of Computer Science & Engineering was established to meet the demand for well-qualified computer professionals. The department has highly qualified faculty and strictly adheres to the RGPV curriculum while supplementing it with courses on emerging technologies.
vision: To be a center of excellence in providing globally standard education and research.
mission: To create technologically competent and ethically responsible computer professionals.

labs.name: Python / AI Lab
labs.description: Equipped with high-end workstations for Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence projects. Students learn Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch.

labs.name: DBMS Lab
labs.description: Dedicated to database management systems, Oracle, and SQL training. Focused on structured data handling and backend development.

labs.name: IoT & Networking
labs.description: Equipped with Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and Cisco networking kits to explore the Internet of Things and complex network architectures.

hod.name: Dr. Pankaj Singh Sisodiya
hod.quote: "We strive to make our students not just engineers, but innovators who solve real-world problems."

name: AI & Data Science
description: This specialized branch is designed for students who want to master the world of data. From Machine Learning algorithms to Big Data Analytics, we cover the tech of tomorrow.

labs.name: Machine Learning
labs.description: Specialized lab for deep learning and predictive modeling. Features powerful GPU-enabled systems for intensive computing.

labs.name: Big Data
labs.description: Hadoop and Spark based infrastructure for handling massive datasets and distributed computing environments.

hod.name: Dr. Pankaj Singh Sisodiya
hod.quote: "Data is the new oil, and AI is the engine. We teach you how to build that engine."

name: Mechanical Engineering
description: The Mechanical Engineering department focuses on power systems, control systems, and renewable energy sources. We prepare students for the heavy industries and power sector.

labs.name: Thermodynamics
labs.description: Analysis of heat transfer, IC engines, and boiler operations. Practical understanding of energy conversion systems.

labs.name: Workshop
labs.description: Central workshop featuring lathes, drilling machines, and welding stations. The heart of practical mechanical training.

labs.name: Automobile Lab
labs.description: Study of chassis construction, transmission systems, and modern engine diagnostics using real-world vehicle models.

name: Civil Engineering
description: Our Civil Engineering department is equipped with heavy machinery for material testing and advanced surveying equipment like Total Stations. We focus on sustainable development.

labs.name: Concrete Tech
labs.description: Compression testing, slump tests, and material quality assessment for infrastructure development.

labs.name: Surveying Lab
labs.description: Equipped with Total Stations, Theodolites, and GPS for accurate land measurement and mapping exercises.

hod.name: Prof. Hemant Badode
hod.quote: "Constructing a sustainable future for the next generation."

name: Electrical Engineering
description: The Electrical Engineering department focuses on power systems, control systems, and renewable energy sources. We prepare students for the heavy industries and power sector.

labs.name: Solar Energy
labs.description: Practical study of photovoltaic systems and renewable grid integration. Features our on-campus solar installation.

labs.name: Electrical Machines
labs.description: Operation and testing of DC/AC motors, transformers, and industrial control panels.

hod.name: Prof. Kapil Padlak
hod.quote: "Energizing the future with sustainable power solutions."
